title: Implement append-only event log task format

log.context:
Both services are active. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

## Changes Implemented

### `/mnt/data/scripts/hooks/subagent-start.sh`
- Replaced the flat `{status, started_at, finished_at, summary}` fields with an append-only `log[]` array containing a single `{ts, event: "started", context: <title>}` entry on task creation.

### `/mnt/data/scripts/hooks/subagent-stop.sh`
- Now reads the existing task JSON and appends a `{ts, event: "done", context: <first 500 chars of last message>, artifa...(truncated)
